title: Upon Deb.
content:
If felt and heard, unseen, thou dost me please;
    If seen, thou lik'st me, Deb, in none of these.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Deb."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
